# INPUT DATA:

# TEST_1:
seats = [[170, 165, 171, 182, 160, 154],
         [173, 170, 172, 184, 165, 160],
         [178, 175, 175, 189, 167, 169],
         [182, 176, 179, 195, 173, 170]]

print(can_see(seats))

# TEST_2:
seats = [[170, 165, 171, 182],
         [173, 170, 172, 182],
         [178, 175, 172, 189]]

print(can_see(seats))

seats = [[170, 165, 175, 182],
         [173, 170, 172, 182],
         [178, 175, 173, 189]]

print(can_see(seats))

seats = [

]

print(can_see(seats))

    [160],
    [165],
    [170],
    [175]
]

    [170, 165, 180, 175, 160]

    [150, 160, 170],
    [155, 165, 175],
    [160, 170, 180]
]

print(can_see(seats))

    [160],
    [170],
    [165],
    [180]
]

    [150, 160, 170],

seats = [
    [150, 151, 152, 153, 154, 155],
    [160, 161, 162, 163, 164, 165],
    [170, 171, 172, 173, 174, 175],
    [180, 181, 182, 183, 184, 185]

seats = [
    [150, 160, 170, 180],
    [155, 165, 175, 185],
    [160, 164, 180, 190]

    [170, 170],
    [170, 171],

    [150, 160],

    [160, 170],

seats = [
    [150, 151, 152, 153, 154, 155, 156],
    [160, 161, 162, 163, 164, 165, 166]

# TEST_15:
seats = []
height = 100

    seats.append([height] * 100)
    height += 1

print(can_see(seats))

     160, 196, 153, 198, 166, 173, 197, 193, 158, 166, 161, 171, 155, 200, 160, 158, 152, 155, 166, 186, 168, 171, 175,
     166, 155, 188, 186, 161, 187, 177, 162],
    [180, 156, 200, 153, 189, 182, 169, 158, 150, 179, 180, 150, 169, 165, 197, 189, 157, 181, 187, 165, 187, 198, 192,
     172, 180, 165, 197, 164, 198, 175, 174, 160, 156, 186, 158, 180, 163, 168, 181, 167, 154, 159, 170, 154, 180, 196,
     167, 165, 172, 188, 156, 166, 172, 154, 160, 191, 154, 186, 181, 177, 165, 184, 198, 158, 197, 150, 156, 170, 193,
     173, 184, 189, 160, 156, 194, 176, 168, 155, 172, 164, 169, 195, 169, 199, 170, 154, 162, 161, 152, 159, 187, 171,
     168, 168, 197, 151, 164, 169, 163, 188],
    [161, 191, 166, 192, 197, 187, 180, 158, 199, 183, 176, 180, 184, 170, 185, 153, 170, 176, 195, 194, 180, 162, 179,
     161, 187, 195, 181, 200, 200, 172, 167, 186, 170, 168, 186, 172, 181, 192, 170, 178, 175, 199, 168, 173, 161, 193,
     159, 157, 170, 180, 155, 165, 172, 154, 166, 150, 190, 165, 189, 190, 161, 177, 185, 173, 158, 168, 160, 154, 200,

     178, 178, 198, 188, 155, 161, 194, 162, 156, 151, 157, 200, 198, 153, 175, 153, 190, 167, 200, 198, 153, 165, 173,

     172, 190, 163, 194, 156, 150, 181, 165, 182, 193, 168, 185, 176, 196, 155, 186, 163, 174, 167, 185, 152, 179, 160,
